Petition For Order To Petition Separate Property Belonging To Deceased Administrator Hattie Ross, Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ken Mifflin appeared by zoom for and with Elvin Carter by zoom.

Mr. Mifflin agrees with the court's position that it is more appropriate to distribute the Wells Fargo account to Elvin Carter as the Trustee of the Hattie Ross Living Trust. The Petition for Order to Separate Property Belonging to Deceased Administrator Hattie Ross is under submission. The court will revise the proposed order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Limited Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ken Mifflin, via Zoom, for Elvin Carter, Petitioner.

The court offers its tentative ruling to appoint his client but without the authority to marshal the bank accounts and that any distributions can be addressed via a petition for final distribution. Counsel offers testimony regarding his client's intent, specifically, to determine why certain distributions have not been made from a related matter.

The court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
